ariaSpec.usage: Sets the proper role for the Splitter pane.
Sets the proper role for the Splitter split-bar element.
An accessible name for the separator.
When a splitbar separates two panes horizontally, its aria-orientation must be explicitly set to vertical.

kbSpec.behavior: Moves up the split-bar in a vertical Splitter.
Moves down a split-bar in a vertical Splitter.
Moves left a split-bar in a horizontal Splitter.
Moves right a split-bar in a horizontal Splitter.
Moves the splitbar up to collapse/expand the adjacent panes in the up direction.
Moves the splitbar down to collapse/expand the adjacent panes in the down direction.
Moves the splitbar left to collapse/expand the adjacent panes in the left direction.
Moves the splitbar right to collapse/expand the adjacent panes in the right direction.
Toggles the collapsed state of the nearest collapsible pane.
The key that allows focusing a splitter bar. Thus, all splitbars have `tabindex` and are included in the tab sequence.
